title: AI-Guided Depression Treatment Pathways
description: Machine learning model to predict treatment response in major depression, enabling personalised antidepressant selection.

title: Portable TMS Device for Home Use
description: Developing a portable transcranial magnetic stimulation device for treatment-resistant depression in outpatient settings.

title: Pharmacogenomic Cancer Panel
description: Clinical-grade pharmacogenomic testing panel for personalised oncology treatment selection.

title: Liquid Biopsy Early Detection Platform
description: Multi-cancer early detection platform using circulating tumour DNA analysis.

title: Rare Disease Gene Therapy Pipeline
description: AAV-based gene therapy candidates for three rare paediatric genetic disorders.

title: Neuromuscular Patient Registry Platform
description: National registry and natural history study platform for neuromuscular disorders.

title: Integrated Care Coordination System
description: Digital platform connecting primary care, specialists, and community services for chronic disease management.

title: Clinical AI Decision Support Tool
description: Real-time clinical decision support using federated learning across hospital networks.

title: Digital Mental Health Monitoring App
description: Smartphone app for continuous mood monitoring in bipolar disorder patients.

title: CAR-T Solid Tumour Platform
description: Next-generation CAR-T cell therapy platform targeting solid tumour antigens.
